title: Compute!’s Gazette magazine, 1983-1995
content:
In July 1983, one of my personal favorite Commodore computer magazines of all time, Compute!’s Gazette, was born. An offshoot of the general computer magazine Compute!, Gazette’s first issue was dated July 1983 and quickly proved successful, closely following the

The post Compute!’s Gazette magazine, 1983-1995 appeared first on The Silicon Underground.
